outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: However, somehow I can tell that there's something different about your gaze today.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: A determination, a fire, that wasn’t quite there before.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I have a feeling that this battle today will be different.

outputs.name: option0
outputs.value: This will be our last battle, Demon.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: If that ends up being the case

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I can’t help but to tell you

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You were the best knight I’ve ever had the pleasure to spar with.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: You think I’ll go easy on you after that?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Oh, do not misread my intentions.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I hope you don’t go easy at all

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Far from that, in fact.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I want you to come at me with all you got.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I want a real, unforgettable battle.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: However, that doesn’t change the fact that I want you to know your hard work really made you stronger.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You’re truly a mighty hero.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: It’d be untruthful to not say you’re a worthy opponent.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Without you, I’d never evolve as much as I did.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: However, your reign of terror ends today, my arch-nemesis.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: We’ll see about that soon enough, my hero.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I… can’t believe it, even after everything I’ve done, after how much I trained

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I still can’t defeat you.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I can’t keep losing like that, my village needs me, I-

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Hero… do you truly care about your village that much? Would you do anything to save it? Anything at all?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I have a proposition for you, hero.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You can’t defeat me, you, or any other human in this world.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: However, like I said before, you’ve got strength.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: A power within your heart

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: That I have never encountered in all my centuries of existence.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I want to polish it, and use it as my own.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: If we fought together, side by side

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: We’d conquer anything we wanted.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Can you see the endless possibilities of what we could achieve, hero?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And of course, your village would be perfectly safe.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And let’s overpower this entire world.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: And with that, in a desperate attempt to protect her homeland,  our mighty hero joined sides with the Boss,  practicing numerous evil deeds alongside him.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: Day by day, she slowly became accustomed with the villainous routine,  and the glory and riches that come alongside it.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: The sacrifice became a blessing,  and she slowly lost the heroism in her heart.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: Maybe one day, she’ll see the error of her ways and try a life of honor again,  however, today I’d advise you to beware of the Demon Boss from hell and his loyal ruthless knight.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: In that one moment, their fate has been sealed.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: The knight, never giving up on her people, kept coming back to the Demon’s castle.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: Every single day she came, lost, and trained once again.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: Everytime getting a little closer, but not quite there yet.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: Late at night, sometimes she wonders if she’s ever going to make it, and tries to hide with guilt, deeply in her mind, the fact that she’s happy with her life just as it is.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: Running to an objective, never winning, but never giving up, and still getting to be with him, as arch-nemesis, maybe that’s what she ever hoped for.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: And that’s how things were meant to be. He’ll always be her villain, and she, always, his hero.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: W-what? I didn’t say that!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: You said I was your favorite, then there must be more!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: When were you going to tell me?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I swear, hero! This is not what it looks like.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I don’t want to hear it!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Hero, you are the only one for me.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: The only one that matters.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: The one I want to defeat the most.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: The most determined, kind, and insufferable one.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You’re, and will always be the person I hate the most in this god forsaken world, you’re my arch-nemesis.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: My favorite enemy to completely destroy in battle!
